entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: हो। विद्यालयहरूले पहिले सार्वजनिक product प्रयोग गर्न सक्छन्, त्यसपछि school-specific workflows, confidentiality र funded access options सहित custom AI learning spaces बारे छलफल गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: हो। Subject hubs learners, Google, र AI answer engines का लागि बनाइएका public pages हुन्। तिनीहरूले private saved chats होइन, public learning guidance र public guest-mode URLs मात्र expose गर्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: हो। Teachers र school leaders ले tailored school deployment discuss गर्नुअघि learning behaviors evaluate गर्न public prompt library प्रयोग गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: हो। guide library Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, र historical conversations जस्ता public guest modes मा link हुन्छ।

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: हो। historical person mode perspective र questioning का लागि learning simulation हो। यसलाई authenticated quotation का रूपमा cite गर्नु हुँदैन।

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: हो। linked public learning modes guest mode मा खुल्छन्, त्यसैले learners ले marketing page बाट सुरु नगरी explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, र थप कुरा प्रयास गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: हो। सार्वजनिक guest learning modes निःशुल्क पहुँचका लागि डिजाइन गरिएका छन्, त्यसैले सिक्नेहरूले school deployment वा paid account बिना सुरु गर्न सक्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: हो। public guest modes र audience pages अभिभावकहरूले यसमा भर पर्नुअघि learning behavior inspect गर्न सकून् भनेर design गरिएका छन्।

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: हो। public guest modes ले school leaders र teachers लाई tailored school deployment discuss गर्नुअघि learning experience प्रयास गर्न दिन्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: हो। public Homework Coach /chat/homework-coach मा उपलब्ध छ, र यो subject hub supporting modes र guides मा link हुन्छ।

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: हो। recommended use भनेको final answers होइन जुन तपाईं explain गर्न सक्नुहुन्न; यसको सट्टा hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, र review prompts हुन्।

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: हो। context का लागि Time Travel, argument structure का लागि History Cause and Effect, counterarguments का लागि Debate, र evidence boundaries का लागि Source Critic प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: inspir platform मा तपाईंले submit, post, र display गर्ने आफ्नो conduct तथा कुनै पनि data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links (“Content”) का लागि तपाईं मात्र जिम्मेवार हुनुहुन्छ। Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) collected data विभिन्न purposes का लागि प्रयोग गर्छ: हाम्रो Service provide र maintain गर्न; हाम्रो Service मा changes बारे तपाईंलाई notify गर्न; तपाईंले छनोट गर्दा हाम्रो Service का interactive features मा सहभागी हुन दिन; customer support provide गर्न; हाम्रो Service improve गर्न analysis वा valuable information gather गर्न; हाम्रो Service को usage monitor गर्न; technical issues detect, prevent, र address गर्न; तपाईंले information provide गरेको अन्य कुनै purpose पूरा गर्न; billing र collection सहित तपाईं र हामीबीच भएका contracts बाट arising obligations पूरा गर्न र rights enforce गर्न; expiration र renewal notices, email-instructions आदि सहित तपाईंको account र/वा subscription बारे notices provide गर्न; तपाईंले यस्तै goods, services, र events पहिले purchase वा enquire गरेको आधारमा, तपाईंले यस्तो information नलिने opt out नगरेसम्म, हामीले offer गर्ने news, special offers, र general information provide गर्न; तपाईंले information provide गर्दा हामी describe गर्ने अन्य कुनै तरिकामा; र तपाईंको consent सहित अन्य कुनै purpose का लागि।

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: तपाईं आफ्नो वास्तविक समस्याको rough version बाट पनि सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। messy first prompt ठीकै छ। सुरु गरेपछि session ले level, audience, deadline, र style clarify गर्न सक्छ।

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: तपाईं हाम्रो Copyright Agent लाई support@inspir.app मा email मार्फत सम्पर्क गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: तपाईं Talk to a Historical Person मा format प्रयास गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। व्यक्तिलाई भेट्नुअघि wider scene चाहनुहुन्छ भने Time Travel प्रयोग गरेर period visit गर्नुहोस्, constraints inspect गर्नुहोस्, अनि मानिसहरूसँग वास्तवमा के choices थिए भनेर सोध्नुहोस्।

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: learner ले तीन कुरा गर्न सकेपछि Socratic AI tutor ले काम गरेको थाहा हुन्छ:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: तपाईं support@inspir.app मा सिधै वा third party sites र tools मार्फत हाम्रो Service सम्बन्धी errors, improvement suggestions, ideas, problems, complaints, र अन्य matters बारे information र feedback (“Feedback”) दिन सक्नुहुन्छ। तपाईं acknowledge र agree गर्नुहुन्छ कि: (i) तपाईं Feedback मा वा Feedback सम्बन्धी कुनै intellectual property right वा अन्य right, title, वा interest retain, acquire, वा assert गर्नुहुने छैन; (ii) Company सँग Feedback जस्तै development ideas हुन सक्छन्; (iii) Feedback मा तपाईं वा कुनै third party बाट confidential information वा proprietary information हुँदैन; र (iv) Feedback सम्बन्धी Company माथि confidentiality को कुनै obligation हुँदैन। applicable mandatory laws का कारण Feedback को ownership transfer सम्भव नभएमा, तपाईं Company र its affiliates लाई कुनै पनि manner र कुनै पनि purpose का लागि Feedback प्रयोग गर्ने (copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute, र commercialize सहित) exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited, र perpetual right grant गर्नुहुन्छ।

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):
entries.value: तपाईं Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) अनुसार हाम्रो Copyright Agent लाई तलको information लिखित रूपमा provide गरी notification submit गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ (थप detail का लागि 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) हेर्नुहोस्):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: तपाईं Service केवल lawful purposes का लागि र Terms अनुसार मात्र प्रयोग गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। तपाईं Service प्रयोग नगर्ने सहमत हुनुहुन्छ:

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights Under General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
entries.value: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) अन्तर्गत तपाईंका Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
entries.value: California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) अन्तर्गत तपाईंका Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your Data Protection Rights under the California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)
entries.value: California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA) अन्तर्गत तपाईंका Data Protection Rights

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: तपाईंको information, Personal Data सहित, तपाईंको state, province, country, वा अन्य governmental jurisdiction बाहिर रहेका computers मा transfer र maintain हुन सक्छ, जहाँ data protection laws तपाईंको jurisdiction भन्दा फरक हुन सक्छन्। तपाईं India बाहिर हुनुहुन्छ र हामीलाई information provide गर्ने छनोट गर्नुहुन्छ भने, कृपया ध्यान दिनुहोस् कि हामी data, Personal Data सहित, India मा transfer गरी त्यही process गर्छौं। तपाईंले यो Privacy Policy मा दिएको consent र त्यसपछि यस्तो information submit गर्नुले त्यो transfer मा तपाईंको agreement जनाउँछ। Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ले तपाईंको data secure रूपमा र यो Privacy Policy अनुसार treated होस् भनेर reasonably necessary सबै steps लिनेछ, र तपाईंको data तथा अन्य personal information को security सहित adequate controls नभएसम्म तपाईंको Personal Data कुनै organisation वा country मा transfer हुने छैन।
